titleStmt.title: SII 18.368: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 368. (B.K. No. 49 of 1934-35.) MĀKANŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone set up near the Rāmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription records the death of Dāsiga in a fight with Vijaya-Pāṇḍya and states that Bhujabaḷa-Pāṇḍya rewarded Dāsiga and the valiant Eṟakama. It also records a grant of land in Mākanūr, made by Chāmagaumḍa to both the heroes.
This record is dated in the cyclic year Viśvāvasu, Bhādrapada śu. 13. The Śaka year is not given. The characters belong to the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiracuṁbicaṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ bhāya saṁbhavē .The letterra is written above the line.
śrī viśvāvasuvarṣṣaṁ bhāvise bhādrapada sudha tēraseyoḷu dhātrīvaḷeyavaṟiye ku
dureyanōvade taḷutiṟidu dāsigaṁ pesaruvetaṁ . hoḷevāyda vijayapāṁḍya
na dhaḷavā beṁkoṁḍu kudureyoḷu taḷutiṟidagaḷada kalidāsigaṁ suraraRead da.
lalaneyaroḷu kūḍidaṁ bharṭa(ṭar) pogaḷuvinegaṁ . Aṟukeya nūṟuṁbāḍakke
ṟeyaṁ tānenisi negaḷda bhujabaḷapāṁḍyā taṟisaṁda dāsigagaṁ kuṟu bara kali EṟaMistake for�

kamagaṁ mecaṁ koṭaṁ . va . Aṁtu mecugoṭu sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamireyare .Written below the line.
kaliyenisirdā dāsiga taṁdegavātana kuḍe koṁḍalaṁghyaparākramaṁgeṟaka
yage manaṁbuge cāmagauṁḍanī nelanuviniṁduyuḷḷinegavuṁba
ḷi Orvvagoṁdu mattaraṁ salisida mākanūra holadoḷu dhare kīrttisi mecuvaṁ
negaṁ . va . Aṁttu dāsigaṁga Eṟakeyaṁgaṁ koṭṭa mattaru 2 narigana keṟeyo
ḷagaṇa Ere Ada pratipāḷisadavaru cu ṁgabhādrātīradalu kavile bārhmaṇaruRead tā
ma vadhi
sidaru .
Digital edition of SII 18.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
